name: Mashed Winter Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cut each squash into lengthwise quarters and scoop out seeds.
3. Place the squash pieces in a baking dish.
4. Score the yellow meaty part of each quarter with a knife.
5. Brush the bottom of the baking dish with vegetable oil.
6. Remove the skin from the squash pieces and discard.
7. Transfer the squash pulp to a bowl and beat until fluffy.
8. Add margarine and beat it in well.
9. If desired, garnish with a sprinkle of cinnamon.
Food Exchange per serving: 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE + 1 STARCH EXCHANGE
Low-sodium diets: This recipe is excellent.
